_comment: Real Signs365 pricing extracted verbatim from the 5 source MD files in repo root. Last updated: 2026-04-29

banners.label: Banners
banners.description: Vinyl, HDPE, canvas, mesh, posters, banner stands

rigidSigns.label: Rigid Signs
rigidSigns.description: Coro, Acrylic, Foamcore, PVC, Polystyrene, Aluminum, Backlite, JBond

adhesive.label: Adhesive Products
adhesive.description: 3M, GF, Orajet, window film, decals, footprints, dry erase, reflective

magnets.label: Magnets
magnets.description: Vehicle door magnets and custom-cut magnets

handheld.label: Handheld
handheld.description: Paper cards and rigid hard-card sets

banner.description: Banner / mesh / canvas / vinyl roll goods. $10 up to 999 sq ft, freight at 1000+ sq ft, freight when any dim ≥ 123".

banner_simple.description: Simple sq-ft banner shipping with no oversize trigger (Backlite).

banner_stand.description: Econo banner stand. $10/each up to 19, freight at 20+.

adhesive.description: Adhesive products. $10 up to 999 sq ft, freight at 1000+ sq ft, freight when any dim ≥ 123".

rigid_sheet.description: Rigid sheet products (Coro / Foamcore / PVC / Polystyrene). Tiered by sheet count, banded by finished size.

acrylic_sheet.description: Acrylic / Aluminum / JBond. Same band shapes as rigid_sheet but with 10+ freight thresholds on the smaller bands.

magnet_each.description: Vehicle magnets. $10 per 10 magnets, freight at 191+.

magnet_sheet.description: Custom magnets by sq inch. $10 per 2025 sq in, freight at 40500+ sq in.

handheld.description: Paper sheets. $10 per 100 sheets (no freight tier listed in source).

hardcard.description: Hard card sets. $10 per 10 sets (no freight tier listed in source).
